$comment: Sample alias map. Keys are code-side node IDs; values are doc-side IDs they should align to. Use a list value when one code entity matches multiple doc entities (rare).
$comment_when_to_use: When code uses path-prefixed IDs and docs use bare names (function:src/auth/login.py:handler ↔ endpoint:POST:/api/login)
When an entity changed name across the boundary (User class is described as UserRepo in the design doc)
When two entities have identical normalized names but represent different concepts (force the right pairing)
